tasks.label: Agent Flow: Create Frontend Handoff
args: $out='tmp\frontend-handoff-' + (Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd-HHmmss) + '.md'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force tmp | Out-Null; Copy-Item agents/handoff-architect-to-frontend.md $out; Write-Host $out

tasks.label: Agent Flow: Create QA Handoff
args: $out='tmp\qa-handoff-' + (Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd-HHmmss) + '.md'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force tmp | Out-Null; Copy-Item agents/handoff-architect-to-qa.md $out; Write-Host $out
